items.title: 'The Next Big Quantum Computer Has Arrived; Quantinuum Unveiled Helios, A Quantum Computer With 98 Physical Qubits And 48 Logical Error-Corrected Qubits, A 2:1 Ratio; JP Morgan Chase And Nvidia Are Early Customers Using Helios To Run Complex Algorithms For Business Problems'- WSJ
Will Honeywell (HON) Split Unlock Value or Complicate Its Sustainable Fuels Ambitions?
items.description: Honeywell International recently announced a corporate restructuring to separate its automation and aerospace businesses, while also introducing a breakthrough renewable fuels technology that converts agricultural and forestry waste into marine fuel, gasoline, and sustainable aviation fuel for hard-to-abate sectors. This innovation not only targets decarbonization in the maritime industry but also enables cost-effective, high energy-density alternatives with prefabricated modular plant...

items.title: November's Dog Of The Dow Ideal "Safer" Buy: Verizon
items.description: Verizon (VZ) stands out as the only Dow stock meeting the 'dogcatcher' ideal this month: annual dividends from $1K invested exceed its share price. Read the full analysis here.
